class.name: Room
class.brief_description: Base class for creating rooms in GonerEngine's custom room system
class.description: When making a new room scene, set a [b]Room[/b] node as the root node.

method.name: goto
method.description: Change the room to a specified loaded [param room] resource [codeblock] Room.goto(load("res://scenes/overworld/rooms/hometown.tscn")) [/codeblock]

method.name: warp_party
method.description: Set all your [PartyMember]'s positions to a [TargetMarkerDest] with a given [param target_marker_id] and set their [param facing] directions. [codeblock] Room.warp_party(1, Enums.Facing.LEFT) [/codeblock]
